user.title: Connect a Poem.town clock
user.description: Find your clock's API token under Dashboard → your clock → Web API on poem.town. A short confirmation note is posted to the clock to verify the token.

data_description.token: The per-clock Bearer token (starts with poem_).
data_description.screen_id: The 40-character screen identifier for your clock.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Poem.town API token
reauth_confirm.description: The API token for this clock was rejected. Enter a new token from Dashboard → your clock → Web API. A short confirmation note is posted to verify it.

reconfigure.title: Update Poem.town API token
reconfigure.description: Enter a new API token for this clock. A short confirmation note is posted to verify it.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Poem.town. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token for this clock.
error.invalid_screen_id: The screen ID is invalid. It must be a 40-character identifier.

abort.reauth_successful: The API token was updated successfully.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The API token was updated successfully.
